notes: The Windows launcher is now a scrollable workflow aligned more closely with the Pathmark homepage.
The first-launch pop-up has been removed; workspace guidance now appears inside the launcher.
The launcher no longer auto-starts before the user can review the workspace and theme.
The launcher keeps one Update action, which creates an update backup and opens the update hub.
Installation wording now puts Pathmark_app directly in Documents while keeping user files in Documents\Workspace by default.
